title: Procurement Suppression
description: Procurement Suppression v1 contract. If available_stock + approved_incoming is greater than or equal to dynamic_suppression_threshold, the material is excluded from procurement unless a large plan has director approval, MRP run, evidence, and audit.
$comment: Sources: PACK-03 procurement suppression threshold. TODO: exact override request lifecycle is not specified.

status.description: Suppression status. TODO: no dedicated enum file was requested; use MRP/material requirement status until split.

suppression_reason.description: Reason for suppression or override requirement.

director_approval_required.description: True when a large plan needs director approval for override.
